title: Why I Have a Very Small Phone
summary: Why do I have a very small phone? Why should you consider it? In this blog, I go into detail on my very tiny phone, why I switched to it, and why you should think about it too.

title: Spatial audio for Audiobooks
summary: Mono voiceover or spatialised recreation of a world? What technologies exist to turn the average audio book into an immersive experience?
